prestazioni: Engine: BMW N73B68 V12 (6.75L, 48-valve, naturally aspirated) – Forced induction via twin Precision Turbo PT6266 CEA ball-bearing turbos with 1.2 bar boost, custom 3.5-inch stainless steel intercooler piping, and a bespoke water-methanol injection system (Snow Performance Stage 3) to mitigate detonation while targeting 650+ WHP on 98 RON fuel.

Drivetrain: Upgraded ZF 6HP28A 6-speed automatic transmission with a Pake Racing valve body recalibration, reinforced torque converter (2,800 RPM stall), and a Quaife ATB differential (85% lock) to handle increased power delivery without torque steer in the extended wheelbase chassis.

Suspension: Full air-ride conversion using Air Lift Performance 3P management with custom 9-inch front/10-inch rear bellows, paired with KW Variant 5 coilover inserts (adjustable compression/rebound) for body control during high-speed maneuvers. Chassis reinforcement via a custom-fabricated 4-point roll cage (T45 steel) by The Performance Company, integrated with the OEM limousine bulkhead for structural rigidity.
estetica: Exterior: Full custom widebody conversion by Liberty Walk (LB Works) designed exclusively for the Park Ward LWB, featuring hand-formed 304 stainless steel fender flares (50mm front, 70mm rear), carbon fiber side skirts with integrated LED accent lighting (Luxxen), and a bespoke front splitter with active aerodynamic elements (adjustable via hydraulic actuators, controlled by a MoTeC M150 ECU).

Wheels: Forged 24x10.5 (front) and 24x12.5 (rear) HRE FF16 wheels with custom offset (-12mm front, -25mm rear) to clear the widened arches, wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (275/30 R24 front, 315/25 R24 rear) for maximum grip. Center-lock conversion via BBS Motorsport hardware with titanium wheel bolts.

Interior: Full reupholstery in hand-stitched Bridge of Weir leather with Alcantara headliner, featuring a custom rear lounge setup with a carbon fiber center console housing a 17-inch touchscreen (Apple CarPlay/Android Auto via Alpine Halo11) and a bespoke champagne cooler (Dom Pérignon Edition) with temperature-controlled storage. Front cabin includes a Sparco Evo II racing seat (carbon fiber shell) with a Schroth 6-point harness, paired with a Momo Prototipo steering wheel (suede, quick-release hub).
